topics.name: Self-Reflection & Improvement Loop
topics.description: Enabling agents to reflect on their outputs, identify improvements, and evolve their strategies over time through iterative self-assessment and inter-episode learning.
keyFindings: Gradient-free whole-system evolution (EvoTest) achieves 38-57% improvement over baselines
MCE achieves 5.6-53.8% improvement through bi-level optimization
Reflective workflows can make GPT-3.5 outperform GPT-4

papers.title: Paper #2: Evolutionary Test-Time Learning for Self-Improving Agentic Systems
papers.authors: ** Yufei He, Juncheng Liu, Yue Liu, Yibo Li, Tri Cao, Zhiyuan Hu, Xinxing Xu, Bryan Hooi

papers.title: Paper #22: A Survey of Self-Evolving Agents
papers.authors: ** Huan-ang Gao, Jiayi Geng, Wenyue Hua, et al. (27 authors)

papers.title: Paper #23: Meta Context Engineering via Agentic Skill Evolution
papers.authors: ** Haoran Ye, Xuning He, Vincent Arak, Haonan Dong, Guojie Song

papers.title: Paper #24: Reflective Agentic AI - Workflows That Outperform GPT-4
